Class Furniture

java.lang.Object
simcli.entities.items.Item
simcli.entities.items.Furniture
All Implemented Interfaces:
Savable, Interactable
public class Furniture extends Item
A placeable item that occupies space in a Room.

Furniture cannot be used directly from the inventory — it must be placed into a room first, at which point it creates a corresponding Interactable via InteractableFactory.

  • Constructor Details

    • Furniture

      public Furniture(String name, int price, int spaceScore)
      Constructs a new furniture item.
      Parameters:
      name - the display name of the furniture.
      price - the purchase price in Simoleons.
      spaceScore - the amount of room capacity this item requires.

  • Method Details

    • getSpaceScore

      public int getSpaceScore()
      Returns the room space required by this furniture piece.
      Returns:
      the space score.

    • createInteractable

      public Interactable createInteractable()
      Creates the in-world Interactable version of this furniture piece using the InteractableFactory.
      Returns:
      a new Interactable corresponding to this furniture type.

    • interact

      public void interact(Sim sim, Scanner scanner, TimeManager timeManager) throws SimulationException
      Attempting to interact with furniture from the inventory throws an exception — furniture must be placed in a room before use. Performs the interaction between the Sim and this object.
      Parameters:
      sim - the Sim performing the interaction.
      scanner - for reading follow-up user input if needed.
      timeManager - the simulation clock (for time-dependent actions).
      Throws:
      SimulationException - always, indicating the furniture must be placed first.

    • copyItem

      public Item copyItem()
      Creates a deep copy of this item for inventory/shop duplication.
      Specified by:
      copyItem in class Item
      Returns:
      a new Furniture with identical properties.

    • toSaveString

      public String toSaveString()
      Converts the object state into a string format suitable for saving.
      Returns:
      a CSV-formatted string: Furniture,name,price,spaceScore.
